//: Copy to azdo-profiles.json (git-ignored) for MORE THAN ONE org. A PAT is org-scoped, so one profile per org. The .env is also a profile; 'default' names the one used when no PR URL and no --profile is given. Set a PAT inline with 'pat', OR keep no secret on disk with 'patEnv' (name an env var the PAT is injected into at runtime).
